22410 Shadowglen Dr, Farmington Hills, MI 48335, USA
Medium-height apple tree, looks to be in good shape. Under the power-line tie-downs. Pretty small fruit, but still juicy. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.

Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
